feedback.details: Mermaid syntax validates successfully via mmdc (line 6-46). No syntax errors, renders correctly.

Missing explicit External System boundary markers (Container_Boundary/System_Boundary not used). Local Model Instances Qwen/Nemotron correctly shown as System_Ext (lines 20-21) rather than containers, but Persistent Storage (Consul/KV, Vault) incorrectly shown as containers (lines 16-17) when they should be external systems. Missing explicit container labels for technology stack on some containers (e.g., no replication factor shown for external systems). Threshold requires 10.0 - significant gaps in boundary notation.

CRITICAL: Self-learning trace flow is incorrect. Criterion requires 'self-learning system receiving traces from Model Routers asynchronously' but diagram shows Admin → Langfuse (line 45) for 'Trace Upload' instead of Model Router → Admin. Missing Model Router → Admin/Langfuse relationship entirely. Bidirectional health check flows not shown for health_check service (lines 38-40 show BiRel for other services but health_check is isolated). Health check external exposure not shown (Nomad should access health_check but relationship missing).

Network segmentation not visualized - narrative at line 55 claims zones are 'implied' but diagram lacks Container_Boundary for DMZ/API Gateway vs internal containers. No firewall boundary shown between public and internal. Bifrost mentioned in API Gateway label (line 8) but not shown as message routing infrastructure between containers - all relationships use standard HTTP/gRPC notation, not bifrost-specific message bus notation. VRAM-aware routing mentioned (line 9) but no visual indication of VRAM tiers or hardware boundaries.

Word count 248 stated at end of file, within 150-250 threshold. Covers container purposes, interactions, and topology. However, developer/operations journey description is vague (line 55-56) - doesn't explicitly reference how diagram supports debugging or deployment workflows as required by PRD.

Fails to visually demonstrate horizontal scaling pattern. While '2x' notation exists on containers (lines 8-17), diagram lacks visual pool of identical model instances with load balancer notation. Model Router (line 10) shows relationships to single adapters, not a pool of N instances. No visual separation of configuration artifacts (Nomad specs) from application code. Adding new LLM model shown as text claim (line 55) not visual pattern - diagram doesn't show Nomad job spec as artifact separate from containers.

Almost entirely missing from diagram. No fallback paths shown when model instances fail. No circuit breaker pattern indicators (Model Router claims 'implements circuit breaker' in label but no visual representation). No <500ms timeout thresholds shown on relationships. No dead letter queue path for unrouteable requests after 3 retries. No health check rerouting visualization. All failure handling is text-only, violating the visual communication requirement of C4 diagrams.

Security zones not visualized - no Container_Boundary showing DMZ for API Gateway vs internal VPC for compute. mTLS mentioned in narrative (line 54) but not shown on diagram relationships. No cost differentiation between local models and frontier API costs. No VRAM utilization tiers (24GB, 48GB) affecting routing decisions. No explicit hardware boundaries. All security/cost information is narrative-only, not visualized.

overall_summary: This architecture diagram fails significantly on visual communication of critical operational concerns. While the Mermaid syntax is valid and basic C4 structure exists, the diagram is essentially a static topology map that fails to show the dynamic operational reality of the system. Critical missing elements: failure handling (circuit breakers, dead letter queues, fallback paths), security zone boundaries (DMZ/internal segregation), extensibility patterns (model pools with load balancers), and the self-learning trace flow (incorrect direction). The narrative attempts to compensate by describing these elements textually, but violates C4 methodology by hiding operational behavior in prose. The diagram requires major revision to add Container_Boundary elements for security zones, explicit failure handling relationships with dashed lines for fallback paths, and correction of the self-learning trace direction. The '2x' replication notation is insufficient to demonstrate horizontal scaling patterns without showing the actual load balancer pattern to model pools.
